---
title: "\'Charlotte M. Yonge and the \\""historic harem\\"" if Edward Augustus Freeman\'"
---

## \'Charlotte M. Yonge and the \\""historic harem\\"" if Edward Augustus Freeman\'

**Author:** Susan Walton
**Date:** 2006
**Imprint:** <i>Journal of Victorian Culture</i> 11 (Autumn 2006) 226-255

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
